data.title: demo: Vectorize — hello world vector search
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare Vectorize (vector search + embeddings).

## What to implement

* `POST /index` generates an embedding via Workers AI and upserts it to Vectorize
* `POST /search` takes a query, embeds it, and returns nearest neighbors
* `wrangler.jsonc` with `[vectorize]` and `[ai]` bindings

## Verify

```sh
curl -X POST https://<worker>.workers.dev/index -d '{"id":"1","text":"hello world"}'
curl -X POST https://<worker>.workers.dev/search -d '{"query":"hello"}'
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/vectorize-hello`
